audit_metadata.auditor: Principal Platform Trust Architect — Demo-Truth Program
audit_metadata.mandate: Every capability shown in a customer demo must exist, work, be operational, testable, measurable, supportable, monetizable, and enterprise-defensible.

demo_tracks.title: Threat Intelligence Operations
demo_tracks.customer_expectation: Show me how threat intelligence becomes action.
demo_tracks.verdict: TIER_B — Operational but incomplete lifecycle evidence

intelligence_ingestion.evidence: 1003 STIX 2.1 bundles in data/stix/. GitHub Actions workflows: multi-source-intel.yml, nexus-intelligence.yml. Pipeline runs confirmed via data/ai-telemetry/last-run.json (run_number: 104).
intelligence_ingestion.gaps: Feed freshness SLA not instrumented. Source diversity (>3 feeds) not confirmed in live state.

ioc_extraction.evidence: apex_ioc_extractor.py — production-grade, extracts IPv4/IPv6/domains/URLs/hashes/CVEs/registry keys/file paths. Syntactically valid, zero external dependencies.
ioc_extraction.gaps: data/ioc/ directory is empty — extracted IOCs not persisted to queryable store. Analyst cannot browse IOC inventory.
ioc_extraction.blocker: IOC persistence layer missing. Must write extracted IOCs to data/ioc/ with timestamps and provenance.

ioc_enrichment.evidence: agent/enricher.py, agent/enricher_pro.py, agent/ioc_intelligence_engine.py present. EPSS enrichment endpoint documented in enterprise_api.py.
ioc_enrichment.gaps: No live enrichment run evidence. No enrichment telemetry in data/.
ioc_enrichment.blocker: Enrichment pipeline must produce auditable output files before live demo.

attck_mapping.evidence: data/intelligence/attack_navigator.json covers 11 techniques. agent/attck_intelligence_engine.py and agent/mitre_mapper.py present with sequence chaining logic.
attck_mapping.gaps: 11 techniques is insufficient for enterprise demo. CrowdStrike/Recorded Future cover 100+ techniques. Gap is visible.
attck_mapping.blocker: ATT&CK navigator must be enriched to minimum 50 techniques before CISO demo.

confidence_scoring.evidence: agent/explainable_confidence_engine.py, agent/confidence_signal_provenance.py, agent/intelligence_trust_tier_engine.py all present with documented methodology.
confidence_scoring.gaps: Confidence scores not surfaced in UI dashboards with drill-down provenance.

intelligence_lifecycle.evidence: agent/intel_memory_aging_engine.py, agent/deduplication.py, agent/janitor.py implement aging, dedup, and cleanup.
intelligence_lifecycle.gaps: Lifecycle state not exposed in a customer-visible dashboard.

investigation_workflows.evidence: soc-workspace.html, agent/soc/ directory exists. agent/soar_engine.py and agent/playbook_generator.py present.
investigation_workflows.gaps: No evidence of active investigation records in data/analyst/.

demo_truth_gaps: IOC persistence store empty
ATT&CK coverage only 11 techniques
No live enrichment telemetry
required_before_demo: Run ioc_extractor against live feed and persist to data/ioc/
Expand ATT&CK navigator to 50+ techniques via attck_intelligence_engine
Surface confidence provenance in dashboard

demo_tracks.title: Detection Engineering
demo_tracks.customer_expectation: Show me how intelligence becomes detections.
demo_tracks.verdict: TIER_B — Strong generation engine, validation evidence incomplete

sigma_generation.evidence: 210 Sigma rules in data/intelligence/detection_rules/sigma/. apex_sigma_templates.py is production-grade with ATT&CK tags, false-positive annotations, per-vuln-class tuning. agent/detection_forge.py integrates with live feed manifest.
sigma_generation.gaps: Rules are file-hash based (cdb_file_hash_*.yml). Need technique-behavior rules, not just hash lists, for enterprise credibility.
sigma_generation.blocker: Hash-only Sigma rules will fail CISO technical scrutiny. Need T1059/T1190/T1486 behavioral rules.

yara_generation.evidence: 169 YARA rules in data/intelligence/detection_rules/yara/. apex_sigma_templates.py covers YARA generation.
yara_generation.gaps: YARA rule quality not independently validated.

kql_generation.evidence: detection_forge.py references KQL. apex_openapi_v3.yaml documents KQL in detection rule packs.
kql_generation.gaps: No KQL rules found in data/intelligence/detection_rules/kql/. Directory may not exist.
kql_generation.blocker: KQL rules not generated. Must run detection_forge for KQL output before demo.

spl_generation.evidence: Referenced in SENTINEL_APEX_DETECTION_FRAMEWORK.md and API spec.

chronicle_qradar.gaps: No Chronicle or QRadar rules found in filesystem.
chronicle_qradar.blocker: Chronicle/QRadar not implemented. Must be flagged as roadmap.

validation_workflows.evidence: agent/quality_gate_audit.py, detection_drift monitoring in data/audit/detection_drift_history.json present.
validation_workflows.gaps: Validation results not surfaced in Detection Studio UI.

replay_validation.gaps: No replay test results in data/.

demo_truth_gaps: 210 rules are hash-only — not behavioral detections
KQL/SPL directories empty
Chronicle/QRadar not implemented
required_before_demo: Generate minimum 20 behavioral Sigma rules (T1059, T1190, T1486, T1566, T1078)
Run detection_forge for KQL and SPL output
Flag Chronicle/QRadar as Q3 2026 roadmap with clear dates

demo_tracks.title: ATT&CK Operations
demo_tracks.verdict: TIER_C — Engine present, coverage dangerously thin

tactics_techniques.evidence: data/intelligence/attack_navigator.json has 11 techniques. agent/attck_intelligence_engine.py implements sequence chaining and kill-chain reconstruction.
tactics_techniques.gaps: 11 techniques across ~200 total MITRE techniques = 5.5% coverage. Unacceptable for enterprise demo.
tactics_techniques.blocker: CRITICAL: Must expand to minimum 50 techniques before any enterprise customer sees this.

attack_paths.evidence: agent/attck_intelligence_engine.py has kill-chain reconstruction from telemetry.
attack_paths.gaps: No attack path data in data/ directory. Engine exists but has not produced output.

attck_coverage_dashboard.gaps: Coverage dashboard not confirmed operational in UI.

demo_truth_gaps: ATT&CK coverage 11/200 techniques (5.5%) — critical
No attack path, sequence, or timeline data generated
ATT&CK operations center UI not confirmed connected to live data
required_before_demo: URGENT: Run attck_intelligence_engine against 1003 STIX bundles to generate full coverage
Target minimum 50 techniques, ideally 80+
Generate attack_paths.json, attack_sequences.json, attack_timelines.json

demo_tracks.title: Graph Intelligence
demo_tracks.verdict: TIER_C — Graph has nodes but zero edges — not demo-ready

graph_nodes.evidence: data/graph/adversary_graph.json, graph_relationships.stix.json, graph_stats.json. Stats: 30 nodes, node_types: {technique: 30}.
graph_nodes.gaps: 30 nodes of type 'technique' only. No adversary/IOC/infrastructure/campaign nodes.
graph_nodes.blocker: CRITICAL: graph_stats.json shows edges: 0. A graph with zero edges cannot demonstrate relationships.

graph_edges.gaps: Zero edges means zero relationships. This is the core failure for Track 4.
graph_edges.blocker: CRITICAL BLOCKER: Must generate graph edges before any demo.

ioc_pivots.evidence: agent/graph_operations_engine.py implements infrastructure pivots, IOC pivots.

infrastructure_pivots.gaps: No infrastructure graph data in data/graph/.

actor_relationships.gaps: Relationships file exists but edges count is 0 in stats.

demo_truth_gaps: CRITICAL: 0 graph edges — graph cannot demonstrate relationships
30 nodes all of type 'technique' — no adversary, IOC, infrastructure nodes
No pivot data generated from 1003 STIX bundles
required_before_demo: URGENT: Run graph_operations_engine against STIX bundles to generate edges
Target minimum 500 nodes, 1000 edges across all node types
Generate import.cypher for Neo4j if needed for live graph UI

demo_tracks.title: SOC Operations
demo_tracks.verdict: TIER_B — Infrastructure present, active workflow evidence incomplete

analyst_investigations.evidence: soc-workspace.html, soc-operations-center.html, agent/soc/ directory present. agent/soar_engine.py, agent/playbook_generator.py operational.
analyst_investigations.gaps: No investigation records in data/analyst/. UI pages exist but not confirmed connected to live data.

hunt_workflows.gaps: No hunt workflow records or outputs confirmed.

alert_workflows.evidence: data/alerts/alert_history.json and alert_state.json present. agent/alert_engine.py operational. Bundles referenced in alert_state: 10+ STIX bundles.
alert_workflows.gaps: Alert state keys are STIX bundle IDs — not analyst-readable alerts. Need alert normalization.

case_management.evidence: agent/soc/ directory contains case management code.
case_management.gaps: No active case records found in data/.

operational_dashboards.evidence: dashboard.html, soc-operations-center.html, unified-ops-hub.html, observability.html all present.
operational_dashboards.gaps: Dashboard pages exist — must confirm they are connected to live data APIs, not static HTML.
operational_dashboards.blocker: Dashboard live-data connection must be validated before demo.

demo_truth_gaps: No active investigation or case records in data/
Alert state uses STIX bundle IDs — not analyst-friendly
SOC dashboards connectivity to live data unconfirmed
required_before_demo: Create 5 sample active investigations with analyst actions and timelines
Normalize alert_state to analyst-readable format
Confirm dashboard pages call live API endpoints

demo_tracks.title: AI Security Operations
demo_tracks.verdict: TIER_C — Engine code present, live telemetry minimal

ai_governance.evidence: agent/ai_runtime_defense_engine.py — Phase 53, implements AI governance, prompt firewall telemetry, session reconstruction. ai-security-ops-hub.html present.

prompt_risk_analysis.evidence: ai_runtime_defense_engine.py implements token anomaly analytics, prompt firewall.
prompt_risk_analysis.gaps: No live prompt risk records generated.

ai_threat_intelligence.evidence: data/ai-telemetry/last-run.json confirms pipeline run 104. api/ai/tracker.json (222KB) generated. agent/sentinel_ai_engine.py present.
ai_threat_intelligence.gaps: AI threat intel is a feed tracker, not adversarial AI threat intelligence (i.e., threats TO AI systems).
ai_threat_intelligence.blocker: Semantic confusion: platform does AI-assisted CTI, not AI security (securing AI systems). Must clarify scope or build dedicated AI attack intelligence.

ai_runtime_visibility.evidence: data/ai-telemetry/last-run.json contains pipeline telemetry only (build times, file sizes). Not runtime AI session telemetry.
ai_runtime_visibility.gaps: No AI session records, no inference telemetry, no LLM workload visibility data.
ai_runtime_visibility.blocker: Runtime telemetry does not exist as real-time stream. MUST NOT be presented as such in demo.

demo_truth_gaps: AI runtime telemetry = CI pipeline metrics only, not runtime AI session data
No prompt risk records or governance events
Semantic scope confusion: CTI-with-AI vs. AI-security
required_before_demo: Decide scope: AI-assisted CTI or AI system security — cannot fake both
If AI security: generate synthetic session records with governance evidence
Display roadmap status prominently for capabilities not yet live

demo_tracks.title: Enterprise Trust
demo_tracks.customer_expectation: Why should I trust this platform?
demo_tracks.verdict: TIER_B — Trust infrastructure strong, confidence explainability needs UI

audit_trails.evidence: data/audit/audit_log.json present. agent/enterprise_trust_engine.py (Phase 51) implements operational legitimacy, telemetry transparency. data/audit/ contains detection_drift_history.json, forensic_feed_report.json.
audit_trails.gaps: Audit log format not validated for enterprise standards (SOC 2, ISO 27001).

evidence_lineage.gaps: Lineage data not surfaced in a customer-facing Trust Dashboard UI.

confidence_explanations.evidence: agent/explainable_confidence_engine.py implements evidence-proportional scoring. SENTINEL_APEX_DATA_SCHEMA.md documents methodology.
confidence_explanations.gaps: Explanations not rendered in UI with drill-down capability.

deployment_lineage.evidence: DEPLOYMENT_BASELINE.json, PRODUCTION_BASELINE_LOCK.json, VERSION_LINEAGE_LOCK.json, GOLDEN_PRODUCTION_BASELINE.json all present.

operational_metrics.evidence: data/audit/PLATFORM_STATUS.txt, data/audit/final_validation_report.json present. GitHub Actions run history confirms 104 pipeline runs.
operational_metrics.gaps: Metrics not on Trust Dashboard in real-time.

demo_truth_gaps: Trust evidence exists but not surfaced in live Trust Center dashboard
Confidence explanations not rendered with drill-down UI
required_before_demo: Wire trust-center.html to live audit_log.json and confidence provenance APIs
Add 'Evidence Lineage' view to Trust Center showing provenance chain

demo_tracks.title: API Economy
demo_tracks.verdict: TIER_A — Strongest track. Real, documented, tiered.

api_documentation.evidence: apex_openapi_v3.yaml — full OpenAPI 3.1 spec. api-docs.html, api-reference-card.html, api-economy/developer-portal.html all present. Tier model documented: Free/Pro/Enterprise/MSSP.
api_documentation.gaps: API base URL intel.cyberdudebivash.com — must confirm live and returning real data.

api_authentication.evidence: agent/api/auth.py, agent/api/auth_v2.py implement JWT + API key auth. TIER_ENTERPRISE, TIER_PRO, TIER_FREE constants defined.

rate_limiting.evidence: agent/api/rate_limiter.py, agent/api/rate_limiter_redis.py — token-bucket per-identity rate limiting.
rate_limiting.gaps: Redis dependency — confirm Redis is provisioned in production.

webhooks.evidence: api-economy/webhook_registry.py present. Webhook push documented for Enterprise/MSSP in OpenAPI spec.
webhooks.gaps: Webhook delivery confirmation not available in UI.

sdk.gaps: SDK documentation and examples not confirmed in developer portal.

stripe_integration.evidence: agent/api/stripe_gateway.py present. agent/subscription_manager.py present. PAYMENT-GATEWAY.html present.
stripe_integration.gaps: Stripe live keys vs. test keys not confirmed.

demo_truth_gaps: SDK documentation incomplete
Redis for rate limiting — confirm provisioned
required_before_demo: Add SDK quickstart examples to developer portal
Confirm API base URL is live and returns real responses

demo_tracks.title: MSSP Operations
demo_tracks.verdict: TIER_C — Engine architecture present, no tenant data exists

tenant_isolation.evidence: agent/enterprise_tenant_isolation_engine.py (Phase 6) implements multi-tenant data isolation, RBAC, audit logging, SLA enforcement, resource quotas.
tenant_isolation.gaps: data/tenants/ directory is empty. No tenant provisioning has occurred. Cannot demo multi-tenancy without data.
tenant_isolation.blocker: CRITICAL: data/tenants/ is empty. Must provision at minimum 3 demo tenants.

customer_segmentation.evidence: Tenant isolation engine implements per-tenant data namespacing.

mssp_dashboards.gaps: Dashboards must be connected to live tenant API — unconfirmed.

sla_monitoring.evidence: Tenant isolation engine references SLA enforcement.
sla_monitoring.gaps: No SLA records or monitoring data in data/.

billing_visibility.evidence: agent/billing/ directory present. agent/revenue_engine.py, agent/revenue_analytics.py present.
billing_visibility.gaps: No billing records in data/billing/ for demo tenants.

demo_truth_gaps: CRITICAL: data/tenants/ empty — no tenant provisioning
MSSP dashboards not confirmed connected to live APIs
No billing or SLA records exist
required_before_demo: Provision 3 demo tenants: Enterprise Client A, SMB Client B, Government Client C
Generate tenant-scoped intelligence and billing records
Confirm mssp-console.html calls tenant API endpoints

demo_tracks.title: Monetization Readiness
demo_tracks.verdict: TIER_B — Commercial infrastructure present, needs polish

pricing_tiers.evidence: pricing.html present. OpenAPI spec documents Free ($0), Pro ($49/mo), Enterprise ($499/mo), MSSP ($1999/mo) tiers. agent/api/auth.py implements tier constants.
pricing_tiers.gaps: Pricing page must be confirmed live and accurate.

payment_processing.evidence: agent/api/stripe_gateway.py, PAYMENT-GATEWAY.html, agent/subscription_manager.py, agent/gumroad_api.py all present.
payment_processing.gaps: Live vs. test mode not confirmed.

enterprise_contracting.evidence: COMMERCIAL_LICENSE.md, ENTERPRISE_CHARTER.md, sla.html, PARTNER_ONBOARDING.md all present.

api_tiering.evidence: API rate limits by tier documented: Free 60 req/min, Pro 500, Enterprise 2000, MSSP 5000.

demo_truth_gaps: MSA/DPA templates missing for enterprise contracts
Stripe live/test mode unconfirmed
required_before_demo: Confirm Stripe is in live mode for demo account
Create MSA template and add to enterprise.html
Add NDA/contract request flow to contact-enterprise.html

critical_blockers_before_any_ciso_demo: Graph: 0 edges — run graph_operations_engine to generate relationship data
ATT&CK: 11 techniques — run attck_intelligence_engine for 50+ technique coverage
IOC persistence: data/ioc/ empty — run ioc_extractor and persist output
MSSP: data/tenants/ empty — provision 3 demo tenants
Sigma rules: behavioral rules missing — hash-only rules will fail scrutiny
AI security scope: clarify AI-assisted CTI vs AI system security before demo
